title: Bread to Hamburguer
description: Bread to Hamburguer transforms your Minecraft bread into a delicious hamburger! 🍔
body:
![BREAD TO BURGUER](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8dcd681f69a745a05c1e5d2167a6ba8b5aeb44b5.png)

**NEED OPTIFINE**

Bread to Hamburguer transforms your Minecraft bread into a delicious hamburger! 🍔
When you rename the bread item to hamburguer using an anvil, it will visually change into a hamburger model — perfect for adding fun and creativity to your world.

This pack is purely visual, keeping the same properties as regular bread while giving it a brand-new look in your hand, inventory, and item frames.

Features:

- Changes bread into a hamburger when renamed to hamburguer
- Works in inventory, hand, and item frames
- Designed to match Minecraft’s original pixel art style
Compatible with Minecraft Java 1.10 – 1.21.1
